hero_sub: SpoLyrics is a Spotify lyrics miniplayer that is minimalist, transparent, and 100% precisely synced using Windows System Media Transport Controls. Built with Python for a better listening experience while you work.
about_p1: SpoLyrics was built to solve a simple complaint from friends: they wanted to listen to songs on Spotify or YouTube Music while working, but the official miniplayers didn't show any lyrics at all.
about_p2: The app pulls duration data in real time directly from the Windows system core, so lyrics sync is 100% precise without relying on any third-party server. The result: lyrics flow along with the song, as smoothly as possible.
about_p3: SpoLyrics is still in active development. Found a bug or have an idea? Feel free to open an issue on GitHub!
demo_sub: Curious how it feels? Play the interactive simulation below — no install needed.
demo_hint: This is a visual simulation of the desktop app. The real app syncs live with your own Spotify.
features_sub: Designed lean, fast, and elegant — only what you need.
feat1_d: 100% precise time sync. Pulls real-time duration data straight from the Windows OS core.
feat2_d: Automatically matches lyrics based on the duration of the playing song version — fixes the Radio Edit vs Album Version mismatch.
feat3_d: Elegant, transparent, and borderless design. Blends beautifully with your desktop wallpaper.
feat4_d: Left-click and hold anywhere to drag the lyrics window to your favorite spot.
feat5_d: Runs quietly in the background. Right-click the tray icon to open settings, hide lyrics, or view shortcuts.
feat6_d: Change lyric color (real-time HSV picker), adjust transparency, and enable "Auto-Start with Windows". Saved permanently.
feat7_d: Automatically checks for the newest version on PyPI and offers a seamless 1-click update experience.
feat8_d: Prevents accidental multi-skips with an 800ms debounce when scrolling through songs with your mouse wheel.
controls_sub: A super clean UI with no conventional buttons. Use these mouse gestures:
install_sub: One command. Requires Python 3.8 – 3.12 (do NOT use 3.13!)
install_pip_d: Open Windows Terminal / Command Prompt and run:
install_pip_note: If you get a pip is not recognized error, use python -m pip install spolyrics.
install_run_d: Once installed, launch it from any directory:
install_run_note: Make sure Spotify is playing a song!
install_os_text: SpoLyrics is exclusive to Windows (10/11). Because it uses winsdk for 0-delay performance without third-party servers, it cannot be installed on macOS or Linux.
cta_title: Ready to sing along with your music?
cta_sub: Install SpoLyrics now and enjoy lyrics flowing perfectly with your music.
footer_tagline: A transparent, zero-delay Spotify lyrics miniplayer for Windows.
faq_a1: SpoLyrics is a minimalist, transparent Spotify lyrics miniplayer for Windows with zero-delay sync, glassmorphism UI, and invisible keyboard controls.
faq_a2: Install via pip install spolyrics. Requires Python 3.8–3.12 on Windows 10/11. Do not use Python 3.13.
faq_a3: Yes. SpoLyrics is open source under the MIT license and free to use.
faq_q4: Does it work with Spotify and YouTube Music?
faq_a4: Yes. It uses native Windows APIs for precise duration matching with both Spotify and YouTube Music.
faq_a5: Yes. Source code is available on GitHub at github.com/paturrr/SpoLyrics.
